mapper.sql: acl.id, acl.calendar_header_id, acl.now_date, acl.week, acl.day_off_flag, acl.attribute1, acl.attribute2, acl.attribute3, acl.enabled_flag, acl.create_by, acl.create_time, acl.update_by, acl.update_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.calendar_header_id as ${tAlias}_calendar_header_id, ${tAlias}.now_date as ${tAlias}_now_date, ${tAlias}.week as ${tAlias}_week, ${tAlias}.day_off_flag as ${tAlias}_day_off_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time
mapper.insert: insert into ac_calendar_line (calendar_header_id, now_date, week, day_off_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{calendarHeaderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nowDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{week,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dayOffFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into ac_calendar_line (calendar_header_id, now_date, week, day_off_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{item.calendarHeaderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.nowDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.week,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dayOffFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_calendar_line set calendar_header_id = #{calendarHeaderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, now_date = #{nowDate,jdbcType=DATE}, week = #{week,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, day_off_flag = #{dayOffFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select acl.* from ac_calendar_line acl, ac_calendar_header ach where acl.calendar_header_id = ach.id and ach.enabled_flag = 1 and ach.default_flag = 1 and acl.now_date between #{dateFrom, jdbcType=DATE} and #{dateTo, jdbcType=DATE} order by acl.id

select acl.* from ac_calendar_line acl, ac_calendar_header ach where acl.calendar_header_id = ach.id and ach.enabled_flag = 1 and ach.default_flag = 1 and acl.now_date between #{dateFrom, jdbcType=DATE} and #{dateTo, jdbcType=DATE} and acl.day_off_flag = 0 order by acl.id
